bug_found_and_fixed.root_cause: src/routes/stripe-webhook.ts:42 detectTier() leggeva solo metadata.tier, NEXT_SESSION_PROMPT.manual.md S317 S1 usava metadata.plan + amount=100 (€1 smoke) non match AMOUNT_TO_TIER (49700/89700). Handler ritornava 200 con warning:unknown_tier (Stripe felice, NESSUNA scrittura D1).
bug_found_and_fixed.production_impact: NONE per €497/€897 LIVE (amount_total fallback funzionante). Smoke €1 fallisce silently.
bug_found_and_fixed.fix: 1-line: metadata?.tier ?? metadata?.plan — production hardening (landing usa 'plan' ovunque)

lessons_learned: S317 metadata.plan vs metadata.tier mismatch in NEXT_SESSION_PROMPT.manual.md S1 — pre-action-check (REGOLA #16 research-first) avrebbe richiesto verifica detectTier() PRIMA di hardcode metadata key in script. Mitigazione futura: pre-action-check su ogni script che invoca API Stripe deve includere grep metadata key in handler.
Production impact zero per €497/€897 grazie a AMOUNT_TO_TIER fallback. Smoke €1 has triggered hardening utile (worker ora resiliente a metadata key drift).
Stripe non ha API REST live per webhook resend — solo dashboard click founder. Pattern carry-over per future debug webhook prod.
